_comment: M6 outlet registry (DESIGN.md §4E), curated. Consumed by poll-news, which registers one sources row per outlet and ingests headline + link + metadata ONLY — never article text (hard aggregation policy). status=active: feed verified working and polled. status=pending: no machine-readable feed reachable as of verified_on; reason in notes; TN-hosted sites may become reachable from India egress (D-017), re-verify then. role=fact-check outlets are registered for M7 coverage work but not polled in M6 (national scope; their consumption model arrives with clustering). include_url_prefixes: for outlets whose feed is national, only items whose URL starts with a listed prefix are stored (the outlet's own section taxonomy, no keyword guessing). Feeds verified 2026-07-05 from outside India.

outlets.name: The Hindu
outlets.tagging_practice: City/district usually named in headline or dateline; section gives state
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by THG Publishing; store headline + link only

outlets.name: The Times of India (Chennai)
outlets.tagging_practice: City section; district rarely in headline beyond Chennai
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by Bennett Coleman; store headline + link only

outlets.name: The New Indian Express
outlets.feed_scope: site-wide (national); TN scoped via URL prefix below
outlets.tagging_practice: URL path carries state section; city/district often in headline
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by Express Publications; store headline + link only

outlets.name: DT Next
outlets.feed_scope: site-wide (Chennai-based outlet; no section feeds exposed)
outlets.tagging_practice: City/district sometimes in headline; no machine section signal in feed
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by DT Next (Daily Thanthi group); store headline + link only

outlets.name: Dinamani (தினமணி)
outlets.feed_scope: site-wide (TN Tamil daily; section feeds return HTML, not RSS)
outlets.tagging_practice: District often in headline; edition pages exist per district on site
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by Express Publications; store headline + link only

outlets.name: Daily Thanthi (தினத்தந்தி)
outlets.feed_scope: site-wide (TN Tamil daily; section feeds return HTML, not RSS)
outlets.tagging_practice: District/town often leads the Tamil headline
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by Thanthi Trust; store headline + link only

outlets.name: Maalaimalar (மாலைமலர்)
outlets.tagging_practice: District/town often leads the Tamil headline
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by Thanthi Trust; store headline + link only

outlets.name: Puthiya Thalaimurai (புதிய தலைமுறை)
outlets.feed_scope: site-wide (TN Tamil TV channel's digital arm)
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by New Gen Media; store headline + link only

outlets.name: Polimer News (பாலிமர் நியூஸ்)
outlets.feed_scope: site-wide (TN Tamil TV channel; mixes TN, national and world items)
outlets.tagging_practice: District sometimes in headline; no section signal in feed
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by Polimer Media; store headline + link only

outlets.name: News7 Tamil (நியூஸ்7 தமிழ்)
outlets.feed_scope: site-wide WordPress feed (TN Tamil TV channel)
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by Vel Murugan Broadcasting; store headline + link only

outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by Greynium Information Technologies; store headline + link only

outlets.name: Dinamalar (தினமலர்)
outlets.notes: DESIGN §4E lists rssfeed.asp, which now redirects to the homepage; rss.dinamalar.com serves an empty page. No machine-readable feed found 2026-07-05. Re-check from India egress and for new feed endpoints.
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by Dinamalar; store headline + link only

outlets.name: Dinakaran (தினகரன்)
outlets.notes: Site answers 403 to non-browser clients (WAF) as of 2026-07-05; no feed endpoint reachable. Re-check from India egress.
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by Kal Publications (Sun Group); store headline + link only

outlets.name: Hindu Tamil Thisai (இந்து தமிழ் திசை)
outlets.notes: No RSS endpoint discoverable (rss/, feeder paths 404; homepage advertises none) as of 2026-07-05. Re-check periodically.
outlets.copyright_note: Full text copyrighted by THG Publishing; store headline + link only

outlets.name: News18 Tamil Nadu (நியூஸ்18 தமிழ்)

outlets.notes: TN-focused fact-checker. /feed serves the HTML app, not RSS, as of 2026-07-05. Not polled in M6 anyway (fact-check role arrives with M7 coverage work).
